sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n7950" key="a)/ndrisma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἄνδρ-ισμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n7950.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">genuine, straightforward dealing,</tr_> in pl. (opp. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">εἰρωνεύματα</foreign>), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0563.tlg001:38:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.Tyr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">38.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
